iot1click.project.devicetemplate.CfnAbou:
In AWS CloudFormation, use the `DeviceTemplate` property type to define the template for an AWS IoT 1-Click project.

`DeviceTemplate` is a property of the `AWS::IoT1Click::Project` resource.

iot1click.project.devicetemplate.Callbac.Description: An optional AWS Lambda function to invoke instead of the default AWS Lambda function provided by the placement template.

iot1click.project.devicetemplate.DeviceT.Description: The device type, which currently must be `"button"`.
